meta.title: Toshi — Modern payments. No gatekeepers.
meta.description: Toshi is the permissionless payments layer to get paid with the simplicity of Apple Pay — no closed keys, no annual subscriptions, no losing control of your money.

hero.subhead: Get paid through a familiar checkout, without closed keys, annual subscriptions, or third-party custody.

problem.title: Accepting modern payments shouldn't take six months.
problem.intro: Apple Pay, Google Pay and the legacy processors turned something as basic as receiving money into a maze of approvals, contracts and fees.

items.title: Closed approvals
items.body: You need keys, verified domains and manual approval before charging a single dollar.

items.title: Annual subscriptions
items.body: You pay just to be on the list, not for using the service. And the price goes up every year.

items.title: Gatekeeper dependency
items.body: If Apple, Google or your bank decides so, you stop charging tomorrow. No appeal.

items.title: Custody of your money
items.body: Money sits in transit for days, in accounts that aren't yours, with opaque holdbacks.

solution.title: A payments layer that actually belongs to you.
solution.body: Toshi is the open infrastructure to get paid like Apple Pay — without asking anyone for permission. Simple for your customer, sovereign for you.
solution.imageCaption: For people who live from what they create.

pillars.title: Permissionless
pillars.body: No forms, no keys, no waiting. If you have a device, you can already charge.

pillars.title: Familiar
pillars.body: The experience your customer already knows: one sheet, one tap, done.

pillars.title: Sovereign
pillars.body: Money goes straight to your wallet. You sign, you decide, you custody.

howItWorks.title: Four steps. No runaround.
howItWorks.subtitle: From opening Toshi to receiving your first payment, it takes less than thirty seconds.

steps.title: Create or connect your wallet
steps.body: A passkey on your device is enough. No seed phrase to store, no extension to install.

steps.title: Share a charge
steps.body: Generate a link, a QR code or drop in the SDK. Works on web, app and in-person.

steps.title: Your customer signs with a passkey
steps.body: Confirm with Face ID or fingerprint. The same flow as Apple Pay — without the restrictions.

steps.title: Settle instantly
steps.body: Money lands in your wallet right away, ready to move, convert or spend.

benefits.title: Designed to feel in control from the very first payment.

items.title: Non-custodial
items.body: Your money never goes through our hands. It moves from your customer to your wallet, no middlemen.

items.title: No subscriptions
items.body: You only pay when you get paid. No annual fees, no minimums, no surprises.

items.title: No gatekeepers
items.body: No one can pause your account, hold your funds or decide if you qualify.

items.title: Familiar UX
items.body: Your customers pay with the same fluidity they use Apple Pay or Google Pay.

items.title: Global from day one
items.body: Charge someone in Madrid, Buenos Aires or Tokyo with the exact same flow.

items.title: Open by default
items.body: Open APIs, public SDKs and verifiable standards. No lock-in.

product.title: Everything you'd expect from a neobank. None of what slows you down.
product.subtitle: Payments, activity and authorizations in an interface built for daily operation.
product.panel1Title: A clear sheet to close the charge.
product.panel1Body: The buyer sees the amount, merchant and account before confirming with a passkey. No unnecessary redirects.
product.panel2Body: Track incoming payments, average ticket size and settlement status without leaving the dashboard.
product.panel3Body: Every authorization happens on the user's device. Toshi coordinates the flow without custodying the key.

forWhom.title: Built for those who get paid. Designed for those who build.
forWhom.imageCaption: From local storefront to global checkout.

items.title: For physical and online stores
items.body: Accept payments at the counter or in checkout — without six-month contracts.

items.title: For independent professionals
items.body: Send a link, receive the payment, see it in your wallet in seconds.

items.title: For creators and communities
items.body: Monetize your audience without a platform skimming 30 %.

items.title: For product teams
items.body: Integrate charges through open APIs and a flow your team can adapt.

security.title: Sovereignty without giving up simplicity.
security.body: Toshi relies on native device passkeys and non-custodial wallets. No seed phrases to lose, no servers of ours to compromise.

items.title: Native passkeys
items.body: Use Face ID, Touch ID or Windows Hello. The key never leaves the device.

items.title: Local signatures
items.body: Every transaction is signed on the user's hardware. We never see the key.

items.title: Non-custodial
items.body: Money goes straight to your wallet. If Toshi disappears, your funds are still yours.

items.title: Auditable and open
items.body: Everything that matters happens on-chain or via public standards. Verify, don't trust.

finalCta.title: Get paid like a neobank. Without asking permission.
finalCta.body: Join the waitlist and be one of the first to start charging with Toshi.

passkey.title: Authorize payment
passkey.body: Use your passkey to sign. The key stays on this device.
